Container.Name: mediacleanuparr
Container.Overview:
Prune your Radarr and Sonarr libraries by TMDb audience rating, with a mandatory dry run.
Scans movies and TV, flags titles below a user-rating threshold you choose, shows a dry-run estimate of the space that would be freed, and only deletes after you review the list and type DELETE. Extra tools: a "Biggest items" view to clear large titles you never watch, an "Empty / 0-byte cleanup" toggle (removes empty entries that are also below your threshold, plus orphaned empty folders), per-title "exclude from future scans", and optional Overseerr/Jellyseerr sync so deletions stop being auto-requeued.
Defaults to DRY-RUN-ONLY and never deletes outside your media folder. Everything else — Radarr, Sonarr, TMDb (required), and optional Seerr URLs/keys, the threshold, and the safety switches — is configured in the web UI after the container starts and saved to /config.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: App data: database, logs, and deletion reports.

Config.Name: Media
Config.Description: Your media library. Mount it EXACTLY as Radarr/Sonarr see it so paths line up. Read-write is needed for empty-folder cleanup.

Config.Name: MEDIA_ROOTS
Config.Description: Comma-separated media roots inside the container. Leave as /media unless you mount multiple media shares.
